quoteFirst: When it is midday in Paris, it is only 11.51 A.M. in London; 11.36 A.M. in Madrid;
quoteLast: at Lisbon; 11.12 A.M. at Mogador; 7.06 A.M. at Quebec; 6.55 A.M. at New York; 5.14 A.M. in Mexico; and so on.

quoteFirst: This was evidently seen by some one on shore, for it was just
quoteLast: when a bugle sounded an alarm, and from the west came a blinding glare, a shrill whistle overhead, and the heavy boom of a cannon.
title: The Philippine Islands
